category_sources: Official README describes Moon Buggy as a simple character graphics game.
source_facts.description says Moon Buggy is about driving a car across the moon.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is moon-buggy; official README and homepage use Moon-Buggy/Moon Buggy.
docs_sources: Official project homepage is the best documentation surface; official GitHub README includes installation and gameplay description.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub repository links the same seehuhn.de project homepage from source_facts.homepage.
tags_sources: source_facts.description indicates game content; official README says it is a character graphics game requiring curses.
